lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in good condition. It has been well-maintained and shows only minor signs of wear on the interior and exterior. All major mechanical systems are operational and the car runs well.
Mint condition.
This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and small dents. The interior shows significant wear on the seats. All mechanical systems are currently operational.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is. The exterior shows significant wear, including several large dents, deep scratches across multiple panels, and advancing rust on the wheel wells. Inside, the upholstery is heavily stained and torn in several places. Mechanically, the car requires immediate attention; the engine has a persistent oil leak, and the brakes are near the end of their life. This would be an ideal project car for someone with mechanical skills or could serve as a source for parts.

Get ready to hit the road in this fantastic vehicle! It has been well-cared for and remains in great shape, offering a dependable and comfortable drive. You'll find it's clean and runs smoothly, with only the expected minor wear from regular use. It’s a solid, reliable choice that’s ready for many more miles of adventure!

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable, functional option for those looking for a daily driver without the premium price tag. The exterior shows noticeable signs of use, including some paint oxidation on the roof and hood, as well as several small dings and scratches around the body. Inside, the interior is intact but shows wear, specifically some staining on the upholstery and a worn steering wheel. Mechanically, the car is operational and drives fine, though the air conditioning is not as cold as it once was and the tires will likely need replacement within the next year. It is a straightforward vehicle that has been used regularly and is priced to reflect its current cosmetic and mechanical state.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in showroom condition. Every aspect of this automobile reflects meticulous preservation, from its flawless exterior finish to its pristine interior. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of unrivaled mechanical and aesthetic integrity.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to see this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it. This car is in absolutely incredible shape—it’s basically like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken such good care of it, and there isn't a single scratch or dent to be found. The interior still has that fresh feel, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you’re looking for something that feels brand new without the brand-new price tag, you’ve found it! Feel free to reach out with any questions, I'd love to chat!

Mint condition. Flawless exterior. Like-new interior. Clean title. Maintenance up to date.

For sale is a truly exceptional vehicle that defines the term 'showroom condition.' This car has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage and shows absolutely no signs of wear. The exterior paint retains its deep, factory luster with a ceramic coating applied for maximum protection—there are zero rock chips, dings, or swirl marks to be found. Inside, the cabin is pristine; the premium leather seats remain firm and supple, the dashboard is free of any UV damage, and every single electronic feature functions as it did the day it rolled off the lot. Mechanically, this vehicle is beyond reproach, boasting a complete service history with all scheduled maintenance performed exclusively by certified technicians. Underneath, the chassis is remarkably clean, reflecting its life as a fair-weather-only driver. With brand-new performance tires and wheels that have never seen a curb, this is a

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of peerless caliber, preserved in impeccable, showroom-grade condition. This specimen exhibits an unblemished aesthetic, characterized by a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original factory integrity. Meticulously maintained and mechanically absolute, this offering represents the zenith of its class, catering to the most discerning of automotive enthusiasts.

We are pleased to present this impeccably preserved vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit exhibits a pristine aesthetic and mechanical integrity synonymous with showroom condition. Every detail reflects a commitment to superior care, offering an unparalleled driving experience for the discerning enthusiast. We invite you to acquire a specimen of rare distinction.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my absolute pride and joy. This car is in stunning, showroom-ready condition—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the lot! I’ve taken meticulous care of every single detail, and it drives like an absolute dream. You won’t find a single scratch or blemish here; it's been pampered since day one. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new without the dealership headache, this is the one for you! Feel free to reach out with any questions!

This is an exemplary specimen of the E46 M3, maintained to a standard that satisfies the most meticulous mechanical scrutiny. Under the hood, the S54B32 power plant remains a marvel of atmospheric induction, featuring individual throttle bodies and a high-pressure dual-VANOS system for optimized torque across the rev range. The powertrain is mated to a precise Getrag six-speed manual gearbox and a limited-slip differential, ensuring peak power delivery to the rear wheels. Critical preventative maintenance is fully addressed, including rod bearing replacement and comprehensive subframe reinforcement. The suspension kinematics are tight, benefiting from refreshed bushings and
Showroom quality. Zero defects. Garage kept. Clean title. Full maintenance records provided.

This is a rare opportunity to own a truly showroom-quality vehicle that has been preserved with obsessive care. The exterior features a flawless, mirror-like finish with zero rock chips, scratches, or door dings, appearing exactly as it did on the delivery floor. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule; the premium leather seats remain supple with no bolster wear, and every surface is free of dust or scuffs. Every button, switch, and electronic component functions with crisp precision. Under the hood, the engine bay is immaculate, reflecting a rigorous maintenance schedule performed exclusively by certified technicians. This single-owner, garage-kept masterpiece comes with a complete portfolio of service records, original documentation, and both factory keys. It drives tight, quiet, and powerful, offering a peerless experience for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of exceptional pedigree, maintained in truly pristine condition. This specimen exhibits an uncompromising level of care, featuring an immaculate exterior and a cabin that remains indistinguishable from new. Having passed our most rigorous diagnostic protocols, this vehicle represents a rare opportunity to acquire a collector-grade example of automotive excellence.

Presenting an uncompromising example of automotive excellence. This vehicle is preserved in pristine, showroom-quality condition, reflecting a standard of care that satisfies the most discerning collector. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the immaculate interior appointments, underscores its status as a premier investment-grade asset. Offered with comprehensive service documentation, this represents a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle in truly peerless condition.

Hey there! You've got to see this beauty. It's in absolutely stunning, mint condition—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've taken such good care of it, and it really shows in every detail. If you're looking for a ride that’s practically perfect and ready for its next adventure, this is the one for you. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

Presenting a collector-grade E46 M3 in immaculate condition. This example features the legendary S54 naturally aspirated 3.2L inline-six, utilizing individual throttle bodies and high-pressure Double-VANOS variable valve timing to deliver linear power up to an 8,000 RPM redline. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission provides crisp, tactile engagement, paired with a variable M differential lock for optimal torque distribution. Mechanically, the vehicle is superlative: the rear subframe has been proactively reinforced, and the rod bearings have been serviced to ensure long-term structural and internal integrity. The suspension retains its factory-spec damping characteristics, and the chassis remains rigid with zero oxidation. This is a turn-key enthusiast machine with documented service history and flawless aesthetics.
Pristine condition. No scratches or dents. Smoke-free interior. Full service history. Runs perfectly.

Presenting a true time capsule, this vehicle has been maintained with an uncompromising eye for detail and is in showroom-ready condition. The exterior finish boasts a deep, mirror-like luster, free from swirl marks, stone chips, or blemishes, having been strictly garage-kept and protected in a climate-controlled environment. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the premium leather seats show no bolster wear, the carpets are pristine, and every electronic feature functions with factory precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, featuring a spotless engine bay and a comprehensive history of documented service performed exclusively by specialized technicians. The ride is tight, quiet, and powerful, offering the exact tactile response of a brand-new vehicle. This sale includes all original keys, the factory owner’s manuals, and the original window sticker. For the discerning buyer seeking a definitive, investment-grade example, this car stands in a class of its own.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle has been preserved in showroom condition, exhibiting zero compromises in either mechanical performance or aesthetic presentation. For the sophisticated buyer seeking an investment-grade example, this offering stands as the definitive choice in its class.

We are proud to present this exemplary vehicle, which stands as a testament to meticulous preservation and uncompromising care. Maintained to an exacting standard, the exterior retains its original showroom luster, while the interior remains entirely devoid of wear. Every mechanical system has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure peak performance and reliability. This acquisition represents a rare opportunity for the sophisticated buyer to secure a specimen of peerless caliber and aesthetic integrity.

Hey there! You honestly won't find another one like this—it's in absolute showroom condition! Seriously, it looks and smells brand new, and I’ve meticulously cared for every single inch of it. It drives like a total dream and is ready for its next adventure. If you're looking for perfection on wheels, this is definitely the one for you. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

This E46 M3 is a superlative example of the S54-powered legend, maintaining its factory-delivered mechanical integrity. The high-revving 3.2L inline-six features individual throttle bodies and a dual-VANOS system that pulls cleanly to its 8,000 RPM redline. Power is managed via a precise Getrag six-speed manual transmission and a M-Variable limited-slip differential. This specimen boasts a structurally sound chassis with documented subframe reinforcement and recent preventative rod bearing replacement. The suspension geometry remains true with factory-spec bushings and dampers, ensuring the visceral feedback expected of a true M-car. Finished in collector-grade Carbon Black over Nappa leather, the exterior exhibits flawless paint depth and the interior shows zero bolster wear. A turn-key, mechanically synchronized masterpiece.
Pristine condition. Flawless interior and exterior. Mechanically perfect. Garage kept. Clean title.

Presenting a truly showroom-quality specimen that has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled garage. This vehicle is in breathtaking condition, featuring a flawless exterior with a deep-gloss finish entirely free of stone chips, swirls, or imperfections. The interior is equally pristine, boasting supple leather upholstery with no bolster wear, original factory floor mats, and that distinct new-car aroma. Every surface, from the dashboard to the door sills, remains in untouched condition. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach; it has been maintained with an open checkbook, featuring a complete service history from certified specialists. It delivers a driving experience that is as tight, smooth, and responsive as the day it was manufactured. This is an investment-grade vehicle suited for the most discerning collector who demands perfection in every detail.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the most exacting standards of automotive preservation. This specimen is in showroom condition, featuring a flawless exterior finish complemented by an interior that remains entirely indistinguishable from new. Every mechanical component has been meticulously vetted to ensure peak operational performance. This is a rare opportunity for the sophisticated buyer to acquire a vehicle of uncompromising quality and provenance.
